meaning: n.舷外支架,突出的梁,桁等
examples: Make sure outrigger were fully extended and installed on firm pad.
An outrigger canoe glides across crystal waters off Palawan Island in the Philippines.
Its primary engines are located on outrigger pylons and struts to maximize cargo space within the hull.
Spectators are enthralled by coconut tree climbing, stone lifting, spear throwing and outrigger sailing in a Polynesian version of Scotland's Highland Games.
They say the suspect crashed his car at a shop in the Outrigger Guam Resort before starting to stab bystanders.
